ideas.name: ASX Filings Analyst
ideas.signal: Public reports, valuation screens, source-backed weekly watchlist.
ideas.preview: A research screener that turns ASX announcements and company reports into a cited weekly watchlist.
ideas.nextStep: Validate with 10 Australian retail investors using a manual weekly report.
ideas.risk: Market data licensing and accidental financial advice.

ideas.name: Parent Volleyball Community
ideas.signal: A focused parent/community coordination product has clearer demand than broad social features.
ideas.preview: A team hub for volleyball parents, starting with schedules, RSVP, carpool, and volunteer coordination.
ideas.nextStep: Run a local team pilot and measure repeat weekly use.
ideas.risk: Distribution depends on clubs and parent group adoption.

ideas.name: School Transport Options
ideas.signal: Parents need safer, clearer transport options for ages 5-10.
ideas.preview: A cautious local-services idea that starts with trusted school transport information before any marketplace.
ideas.nextStep: Interview 15 parents and 5 school administrators about trust and logistics.
ideas.risk: Trust, liability, regulation, and operations are hard.

ideas.name: Slowdown Personal Reset
ideas.signal: A lightweight app already exists; next question is retention and use frequency.
ideas.preview: A built wellbeing prototype focused on quick reset rituals, now needing retention evidence.
ideas.nextStep: Track 7-day return use and collect qualitative feedback.
ideas.risk: Wellbeing apps are crowded and hard to monetize.

ideas.name: Idea Reputation System
ideas.signal: People can earn recognition by improving ideas, not just building apps.
ideas.preview: The platform layer that turns critiques, pivots, evidence, and prototypes into visible contributor reputation.
ideas.nextStep: Define badges and contribution events that cannot be gamed easily.
ideas.risk: Low-quality AI-generated comments could flood the system.

ideas.name: ProIdea Dossier Builder
ideas.signal: The valuable artifact may be a complete opportunity packet, not the idea itself.
ideas.preview: A repeatable dossier format for graduating free ideas into investor-ready ProIdeaStore opportunities.
ideas.nextStep: Create one dossier manually and see if builders or investors ask for more.
ideas.risk: Research quality must be high enough to justify curation.
